label: Magnets, electromagnets, and parts
descriptions: ELECTROMAGNETS; PERMANENT MAGNETS AND ARTICLES TO BE PERMANENT AFTER MAGNETIZATION; ELECTROMAGNETIC OR PERMANENT MAGNET CHUCKS, BRAKES ETC.; PARTS
scope_note: Broad magnet proxy; includes non-rare-earth and non-permanent-magnet products.
quantity_note: Reported mass combines compatible kg measures across first and independent second quantity slots. It is coverage, not necessarily total physical tonnage. Unit value uses only value and mass from the same unsuppressed first-quantity bucket.
